title: Clover's Pack
description:
Customized Low Shield, 
Low fire, Visible powdered Snow,
Smaller Totem Pop Animation.
body:
![Clover's Pack mainly focuses on optimizing your PvP Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4112096a2157bd62276e0392808c938d64bf5a3e.png)

# Clover's Pack
## Custom Shield
This Pack has a lowered and minimized Version of the default Shield to optimize 
your experience!
### Quality of Life Changes
Through Low fire and a smaller Totem Pop Animation your screen will be much cleaner
### Couloured Powdered Snow
Tired of falling into deep pits of powdered Snow? I gotcha :3
